behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names dagster_hightouch, DagsterLibraryRegistry, dagster_shared.libraries, relative import patterns, pyproject.toml, __all__, ruff==0.11.5, and dagster_hightouch_tests/ — all specifics tests check for.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken and required properties, but doesn't give exact line edits; agent must find the relative imports and fix them.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior (import success, wheel build, ruff passes, exports accessible) rather than specific variable names or line positions.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute subprocesses to build wheels, import modules, run pytest, and run ruff — actual behavior checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p test requires concrete fix: wheel build, dagster_shared import, package import, library registration, all exports — a stub cannot satisfy these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover sdist build, absolute imports via import check, library registry, exports, ruff lint/format, and repo tests as required.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are named descriptively with docstrings distinguishing FAIL-TO-PASS and PASS-TO-PASS cases.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names are consistent throughout.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction mentions module areas (e.g., resources, ops) via their relative import symptoms but does not specify exact line numbers; localization still required.
